adequately meet the patient's needs, it would not be reasonable and necessary for HHA 
personnel to furnish such services. Ordinarily it can be presumed that there is no able 
and willing person in the home to provide the services being rendered by the HHA unless 
the patient or family indicates otherwise and objects to the provision of the services by 
the HHA, or unless the HHA has first hand knowledge to the contrary.
